nasb.text: They will be put to shame and even humiliated, all of them; The manufacturers of idols will go away together in humiliation.

esv.text: All of them are put to shame and confounded; the makers of idols go in confusion together.

cnv.text: 製造偶像的都必蒙羞受辱， 都要一同歸於羞愧。

ccb.text: 制造偶像的都必蒙羞受辱， 一同惭愧。

csbs.text: 所有制造偶像的工匠都必蒙羞受辱， 一同羞愧离去。
